scenarios.description: children() on element with only non-Element childNodes goes through build path and returns empty list
scenarios.precondition: Element el has one TextNode child
pseudocode: TEST TC05 children no element children

scenarios.description: children() with multiple Element childNodes iterates loop more than once and returns all children
scenarios.precondition: Element el has two Element children
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Elements list of size 2 in correct order
pseudocode: TEST TC06 children two element children

scenarios.description: children() second call returns cached list via shadowChildrenRef without rebuilding
scenarios.precondition: Element el has one Element child; children() called once before
scenarios.expectedResult: second children() call returns same Elements instance (cache hit)
pseudocode: TEST TC07 children cache hit on second call
